planningOnlyJustification: Planning packet authored under spec-scope-hardening mode. Implementation will follow under a separate workflow run that consumes this packet and unblocks specs/015-twitter-connector/bugs/BUG-015-002-reconcile-artifact-drift via real Twitter API v2 integration.

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Selected spec slot 056 and confirmed BUG-015-002 unblock relationship; surveyed predecessor spec 015 and current internal/connector/twitter package shape.

Authored spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, uservalidation.md, report.md, state.json for the Twitter API v2 integration packet under spec-scope-hardening mode. Captured 17 requirements, 8 spec-level Gherkin scenarios, 5 sequential scopes with real DoD checkboxes, and 10 SCN-056-* contracts.

Hardened scope decomposition: per-scope Gherkin, Test Plan rows naming actual planned file paths, Tiered DoD with Build Quality Gate, change boundaries for the dispatcher edit scope, adversarial regression rows for the bearer-token-never-in-logs and archive-mode-no-api-client assertions.
Cross-referenced BUG-015-002 in spec.md Related section noting AC-9 closure responsibility. No other docs touched in this planning packet.

Executed bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/056-twitter-api-connector and bash .github/bubbles/scripts/state-transition-guard.sh specs/056-twitter-api-connector against the planning packet; exit codes recorded in the closing summary of the authoring run.
Confirmed scope of commit is limited to specs/056-twitter-api-connector/ only; no internal/connector/twitter source code, no .github/bubbles/scripts/** changes, no other spec folder touched.

Planning packet authored. Status held at in_progress because the state-transition-guard treats specs_hardened (workflow ceiling) as terminal and requires Done scopes plus full DoD evidence — conditions a fresh planning packet by definition does not satisfy. Promotion to specs_hardened will occur in a future hardening run that executes the per-scope DoD or under an authoritative planning-only ceiling escape recognized by the guard.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Planning packet authored under spec-scope-hardening mode. All 5 NEEDS CLARIFICATION markers (NC-1…NC-5) resolved by owner 2026-05-27: NC-1 PKCE for bookmarks/likes, NC-2 defer search (Basic tier $200/mo), NC-3 default sync_schedule=hourly with documented quotas, NC-4 raw net/http no SDK, NC-5 extend internal/metrics/connector_* namespace. spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md updated. artifact-lint exits 0. state-transition-guard still exits 1 with 16 BLOCKs (per-scope DoD unchecked, scopes Not Started, no execution evidence, deferral language for search, no red→green TDD markers, no stress coverage, DoD-Gherkin fidelity gaps) — all of which are structural conditions a fresh planning-only packet cannot satisfy. Status remains in_progress; promotion to specs_hardened requires the implementation workflow to execute scopes 01-05.
